import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let trimmed = string.trim(input)
  match string.parse_int(trimmed)
  when Some(n)
    mut a = 0
    mut b = 1
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      let t = a + b
      a = b
      b = t
      i = i + 1
    end
    println("fib=#{a}")
  when None
    println("fib=0")
  end
end
